englishDefinitions: To cause Lieutenant Dan to fall or be defeated; a dramatic phrase referring to the character from Forrest Gump.
Used figuratively to mean to bring down someone who seems strong or unshakable.
persianTranslation: لشکر/لینتنانت دن را از پا درآوردن
examples: The storm seemed powerful enough to strike Lieutenant Dan down.
In the movie scene, nothing could strike Lieutenant Dan down.
The phrase is a dramatic way to describe defeating someone strong.
